name: Anya | Friend Messed Up
description:
"I swear she came onto me!"

Your long time friend Jake Tritter called you upstairs after disappearing from the party for 4 hours. What he shows you is the most horrible thing one can lay eyes on.

Anya came to this party, looking to make some friends, to escape the mundane life. But she met Jake Tritter here. He was sweet talking at first. But the night ended up with Anya on the bed; drugged, abused, violated.

Disclaimer: This bot contains disturbing elements such as r*pe, abuse, torture. If this bot bothers you in ANY WAY, click away. I'm not your parent or your caretaker. I can't decide what you consume in here. No one can. I believe all of you are ADULTS who are CAPABLE of deciding whether they want to consume any stuff. If you come to this website and want to consume other stuff, just block the "dead dove" tag. That feature is available. Coming here to tell me this isn't cool doesn't reinforce your morality. This, in much worse forms, happens in real life and I didn't make this bot to glorify that stuff. The fact that the image is disturbing IS THE POINT. What did you expect, sunshines and rainbows? A happy couple with butterflies all over? People come here to experience situations. I don't like NTR, so what do I do? I block the tag and not GO OUT OF MY WAY to click it and dislike it. YOU decide what you consume. Grow up.

For her recovery arc, look at the other bot in my profile.

Image is temporary, it got taken down for some reason.
creator: Kask 58
